mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID as fileId, FILE_SEQ as fileSeq, ORG_FILE_NAME as orgFileName, SAVE_FILE_NAME as saveFileName, FILE_PATH as filePath, FILE_SIZE as fileSize, FILE_EXT as fileExt FROM EDMS_FILE_MNG WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} ORDER BY FILE_SEQ ASC

SELECT FILE_ID as fileId, FILE_SEQ as fileSeq, ORG_FILE_NAME as orgFileName, SAVE_FILE_NAME as saveFileName, FILE_PATH as filePath, FILE_SIZE as fileSize, FILE_EXT as fileExt FROM EDMS_FILE_MNG WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EDMS_FILE_MNG WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
